column1: Do you have _______ white bread in your house? (буханка, батон)
We can share _________ of condensed milk with you. (жестяная банка)
Tom eats the last ______ of bread. (тонкий кусочек)
She ______ stop crying, because her brother took her toy.
My mother __________ play the piano very well. She was so talented musician.
They _______ home by car in a day.
My father usually ________ to the stadium on Sundays
